  "executive_summary": "The gradual P99 latency increase from 200ms to 1800ms — with normal database query times, no errors, and no deployment trigger — strongly points to degradation in one or more external API dependencies (geocoding, carrier rates, or payment gateway). The gradual onset and success-without-speed profile is characteristic of an upstream service experiencing increasing load or degradation, combined with insufficient timeout/circuit-breaker protection in the logistics API.
